name: Grape Nuts and Grains
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
3. Cover the pan with aluminum foil.
4. Place the pan in the oven and set to the temperature specified by the recipe.
5. Bake for the recommended time, then remove from the oven.
6. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
